insurer.name: Aditya Birla Health Insurance Co. Limited
insurer.address: 9th Floor, Tower 1, One Indiabulls Centre, Jupiter Mills Compound, 841, Senapati Bapat Marg, Elphinstone Road, Mumbai 400013

policy.name: Group Protect
policy.full_name: Group Protect - Policy Terms and Conditions

coverages.name: OPD Expenses
coverages.description: Indemnifies reasonable and customary charges incurred for medically necessary outpatient treatment, including doctor consultations, diagnostic tests and pharmacy expenses.
conditions: Treatment must be medically necessary and incurred on an outpatient basis.
Charges must be within the limits specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table.

sub_benefits.name: Doctor Consultation
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: Reasonable and customary charges for medically required consultations, visits to a doctor (minimum MBBS qualification), e‑consultation and tele‑consultation for listed specialties within our network (if opted).
sub_benefits.what_is_not_covered: Any outpatient consultation costing more than the specified limits.
sub_benefits.limit_description: Subject to the limits specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table.

sub_benefits.name: Diagnostic Tests
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: Reasonable and customary charges for medically required diagnostic tests listed in the schedule, incurred on an outpatient basis.
sub_benefits.what_is_not_covered: Any outpatient diagnostic test costing more than the specified limits.
sub_benefits.limit_description: Subject to the limits specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table.

sub_benefits.name: Pharmacy Expenses
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: Reasonable and customary charges for medically required pharmacy expenses incurred on an outpatient basis.
sub_benefits.what_is_not_covered: Any outpatient pharmacy expense costing more than the specified limits.
sub_benefits.limit_description: Subject to the limits specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table.

coverages.name: Cancer Secure Cover
coverages.description: Provides a lump‑sum payout as a percentage of the Sum Insured for covered cancer diagnoses (Early, Major or Advanced Stage) based on the selected option.
conditions: Covered illness must be first diagnosed or first manifest during the policy period as a first incidence.
Initial waiting period as specified in the policy schedule applies.
Survival period as specified in the policy schedule applies.
section_specific_exclusions: Any illness other than those specified as covered under this section.
Narcotics used unless prescribed by a medical practitioner.

options.description: 100 % payout for Major Stage Cancer or Advanced Stage Cancer; cover terminates after such claim.
options.payout_details: Major Stage Cancer – 100 % of Sum Insured (cover terminates). Advanced Stage Cancer – 100 % of Sum Insured (cover terminates).

options.description: Up to 150 % payout with separate percentages for Early, Major and Advanced Stage Cancer.
options.payout_details: Early Stage Cancer – 50 % of Sum Insured or Rs 10 Lacs (whichever is lower). Major Stage Cancer – 100 % of Sum Insured. Advanced Stage Cancer – 150 % of Sum Insured. Total payment limited to 150 % of Sum Insured if multiple stages occur.

coverages.name: Second Opinion
coverages.description: Provides a one‑time e‑opinion from the insurer’s panel of medical practitioners for surgical procedures related to any stage of cancer.
conditions: Benefit can be availed only once per covered illness during the policy period.
Insured must request the opinion through the call centre.
E‑opinion is limited to the covered illness and is not for medico‑legal purposes.
Insurer does not assume liability for any loss arising from the opinion.

coverages.name: Post Cancer OPD Consultations/Medication
coverages.description: Pays a quarterly limit for OPD consultations and prescribed medication after a Major or Advanced Stage Cancer claim is admitted.
conditions: Limit is per insured person per policy year.
Applicable only after a claim for Major or Advanced Stage Cancer has been admitted.

coverages.name: Counselling Sessions
coverages.description: Pays a per‑session limit for counselling after a cancer diagnosis (Early, Major or Advanced Stage).
conditions: Limit is per insured person per policy year.
If availed with Early Stage Cancer, can be used only for Major or Advanced Stage Cancer in the subsequent policy year.

coverages.name: Reconstructive Surgery
coverages.description: Pays the limit for reconstructive surgery required after Major or Advanced Stage Cancer.
conditions: Limit is per insured person per policy year.

coverages.name: Palliative Care
coverages.description: Pays a daily limit for palliative care after an Advanced Stage Cancer diagnosis, up to a maximum period.
conditions: Limit is per insured person per policy year.

coverages.name: Genetic Testing
coverages.description: Pays the limit for genetic testing related to the diagnosed Major or Advanced Stage Cancer.
conditions: Limit is per insured person per policy year.

coverages.name: Income Protect
coverages.description: Provides a monthly income benefit for continuous disability of at least 7 consecutive inpatient days due to illness or injury.
conditions: Insured must be a salaried individual with ITR proof for the 2 years preceding loss.
Insured must be on the direct payroll of a registered Indian employer for minimum six continuous months before the start date.
Benefit payable after a deductible period of days as specified in the schedule.
Disability must be certified by a medical practitioner (minimum MBBS qualification).
Benefit payable monthly for each 30‑day period of continuous disability after deductible, until reinstatement of employment or recovery.

coverages.name: Preferred Provider Network
coverages.description: Covers medical expenses incurred only at network providers/empaneled service providers on a cashless basis.
conditions: Only cashless facilities can be availed at network providers.
Benefit is applicable only when Section II.1 (OPD Expenses) is in force.
section_specific_exclusions: Medical expenses incurred beyond the applicable network providers/empaneled service providers.

coverages.name: Heart Secure Cover
coverages.description: Provides a lump‑sum payout as a percentage of the Sum Insured for specified cardiac illnesses and procedures.
conditions: Maximum liability 100 % of Sum Insured during the lifetime of the insured.
Only one claim admissible for any covered illness.
If multiple illnesses diagnosed within 48 hours, only the claim with the highest payout is admissible.

sub_benefits.name: Covered Illnesses
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: First Heart Attack, Open Chest CABG, Open Heart Valve Replacement/Repair, Stroke with permanent symptoms, Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator, Pacemaker insertion, Angioplasty, Minimally invasive aorta surgery, Major aorta surgery, Balloon Valvotomy/Valvuloplasty, Heart Transplant, Primary Pulmonary Hypertension.
sub_benefits.what_is_not_covered: Other acute coronary syndromes, angina pectoris, non‑specified procedures, certain congenital or less severe conditions as detailed in the policy.
sub_benefits.limit_description: 100 % of Sum Insured for each listed illness; availability varies by option (A‑H) as shown in the product benefit table.

section_specific_exclusions: Procedures excluded per each illness definition (e.g., angioplasty excluded for CABG).

coverages.name: Cancer Assure Cover
coverages.description: Indemnifies reasonable and customary charges for cancer treatment, including inpatient hospitalization, day‑care, OPD, pre‑ and post‑hospitalization, ambulance, and follow‑up care.
conditions: Covered illness must be first diagnosed or first manifest during the policy period.
Initial waiting period as specified in the schedule applies.
Survival period as specified in the schedule applies.

sub_benefits.name: In‑patient Hospitalization
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: Room rent (single private A/C), ICU charges, operation theatre, medical practitioner fees, qualified nurses, medicines, consumables, investigations, anaesthesia, blood, oxygen, surgical appliances, prosthetic devices, and prescribed medication.
sub_benefits.what_is_not_covered: Costs above the room category limit (excess proportionate to difference), pharmacy and consumables, implants, diagnostics (except as part of associated expenses).
sub_benefits.limit_description: Subject to Sum Insured/sub‑limit as per policy schedule; proportionate deductions apply for room category upgrades; no deductions for ICU.

sub_benefits.name: Day Care Treatment
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: Medical expenses for day‑care procedures performed as medically necessary, including observation period after procedure.
sub_benefits.limit_description: Up to the limits specified in the schedule.

sub_benefits.name: OPD Treatment
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: Consultations, diagnostic tests and pharmacy expenses incurred on an outpatient basis due to the covered cancer illness.
sub_benefits.limit_description: Up to the limits specified in the schedule; must be supported by prescription.

sub_benefits.name: Pre‑hospitalization Medical Expenses
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: Reimbursable expenses incurred before hospitalization for the same cancer illness.
sub_benefits.limit_description: Up to the limits specified; number of days as per schedule; requires prior admission claim acceptance.

sub_benefits.name: Post‑hospitalization Medical Expenses
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: Reimbursable expenses incurred after discharge for the same cancer illness.
sub_benefits.limit_description: Up to the limits specified; number of days as per schedule; requires prior admission claim acceptance.

sub_benefits.name: Emergency Road Ambulance Cover
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: Transportation costs by road ambulance to the nearest hospital for an emergency caused by the covered cancer illness.
sub_benefits.limit_description: Up to the limits specified in the schedule; ambulance provider must be registered.

sub_benefits.name: Follow‑up Care Post Treatment
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: Two medical examinations per policy year after treatment discontinuation with 'No evidence of disease' declaration.
sub_benefits.limit_description: Up to the limits specified in the schedule.

section_specific_exclusions: External appliances or devices used for diagnosis/treatment (except intra‑operative).
Prosthetic devices that are self‑detachable/removable without surgery.

coverages.name: Hospital Cash Benefit
coverages.description: Pays a daily cash amount for each continuous 24‑hour hospitalization period for medically necessary treatment.
conditions: Hospitalization must be for at least 7 consecutive days and cause inability to perform daily routine activities.
Benefit payable for a maximum number of days per hospitalization event and per policy year as specified.
Deductible days as specified in the schedule apply before benefit starts.
section_specific_exclusions: Hospitalization as a donor for another person's organ transplantation.

coverages.name: Major Illnesses Cover – Domestic Hospitalization
coverages.description: Indemnifies reasonable and customary charges for inpatient treatment of listed major illnesses and surgical procedures.
conditions: Illness or surgical procedure must be first diagnosed or first manifest during the policy period.
Initial waiting period of 90 days (or as specified) applies.
Hospitalization must be medically necessary and follow written advice of a medical practitioner.

sub_benefits.name: In‑patient Hospitalization
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: Room rent (single private A/C), ICU charges, operation theatre, medical practitioner fees, qualified nurses, medicines, consumables, investigations, anaesthesia, blood, oxygen, surgical appliances, prosthetic devices, and prescribed medication.
sub_benefits.what_is_not_covered: Costs above the room category limit (excess proportionate to difference), pharmacy and consumables, implants, diagnostics (except as part of associated expenses).
sub_benefits.limit_description: Subject to Sum Insured/sub‑limit as per schedule; proportionate deductions for room upgrades; no deductions for ICU.

sub_benefits.name: Pre‑hospitalization Medical Expenses
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: Reimbursable expenses incurred before hospitalization for the same major illness.
sub_benefits.limit_description: Up to the Sum Insured for the number of days specified in the schedule; requires prior admission claim acceptance.

sub_benefits.name: Post‑hospitalization Medical Expenses
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: Reimbursable expenses incurred after discharge for the same major illness.
sub_benefits.limit_description: Up to the Sum Insured for the number of days specified in the schedule; requires prior admission claim acceptance.

sub_benefits.name: Emergency Road Ambulance Cover
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: Transportation by road ambulance to the nearest hospital for emergencies caused by a major illness.
sub_benefits.limit_description: Up to the limits specified in the schedule; ambulance provider must be registered.

coverages.name: Credit Protect
coverages.description: Pays the outstanding loan balance (subject to maximum limit) in case of accidental death (AD) or permanent total disablement (PTD) of the insured.
conditions: Accident must occur during the policy period.
For PTD, the disability must be permanent, total, and occur within 365 days of the accident.
Claim must be for the insured's own loan portion if the loan is joint.

sub_benefits.name: Accidental Death (AD)
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: Death of the insured due to an injury within 365 days of the accident.
sub_benefits.what_is_not_covered: None beyond the defined period; any claim after payment discovered alive must be reimbursed.

sub_benefits.name: Permanent Total Disablement (PTD)
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: Permanent total loss of sight, both hands/feet, one hand and one foot, one eye plus a limb, both ears plus a limb or sight, total loss of hearing plus speech, total loss of speech plus a limb or eye, or any condition causing inability to earn a living.
sub_benefits.what_is_not_covered: Disabilities caused by infections (except pyogenic), or any surgical procedure not directly resulting from the injury.

section_specific_exclusions: Accidents occurring during motor racing, trial runs, or any strike/labour disturbance.
Any loss where the insured had prior knowledge of likely loss.

coverages.name: Heart Assure Cover
coverages.description: Provides a lump‑sum payout as a percentage of the Sum Insured for specified cardiac illnesses and procedures, similar to Section II.5 but under a separate product.
conditions: Maximum liability 100 % of Sum Insured during the lifetime of the insured.
Only one claim admissible for any covered illness.
If multiple illnesses diagnosed within 48 hours, only the claim with the highest payout is admissible.

sub_benefits.name: Covered Illnesses
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: First Heart Attack (Myocardial Infarction), Open Chest CABG, Open Heart Valve Replacement/Repair, Stroke with permanent symptoms, Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator, Pacemaker insertion, Angioplasty, Minimally invasive aorta surgery, Major aorta surgery, Balloon Valvotomy/Valvuloplasty, Heart Transplant, Primary Pulmonary Hypertension.
sub_benefits.what_is_not_covered: Other acute coronary syndromes, angina pectoris, procedures excluded per each illness definition (e.g., angioplasty excluded for CABG).
sub_benefits.limit_description: 100 % of Sum Insured for each listed illness; availability varies by option (A‑H) as per product benefit table.

section_specific_exclusions: Procedures excluded per each illness definition.

coverages.name: Heart Diseases Cover
coverages.description: Provides a lump‑sum payout for specified cardiac illnesses and procedures (same as Heart Secure Cover).
conditions: Maximum liability 100 % of Sum Insured during the lifetime of the insured.
Only one claim admissible for any covered illness.
If multiple illnesses diagnosed within 48 hours, only the claim with the highest payout is admissible.

sub_benefits.name: Covered Illnesses
sub_benefits.what_is_covered: First Heart Attack, Open Chest CABG, Open Heart Valve Replacement/Repair, Stroke with permanent symptoms, Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator, Pacemaker insertion, Angioplasty, Minimally invasive aorta surgery, Major aorta surgery, Balloon Valvotomy/Valvuloplasty, Heart Transplant, Primary Pulmonary Hypertension.
sub_benefits.what_is_not_covered: Other acute coronary syndromes, angina pectoris, procedures excluded per each illness definition.
sub_benefits.limit_description: 100 % of Sum Insured for each listed illness; availability varies by option (A‑H) as per product benefit table.

section_specific_exclusions: Procedures excluded per each illness definition.

coverages.name: Heart Diseases Cover – Options Grid
coverages.description: Tabular grid showing availability of each covered illness across options A‑H.

options.payout_details: 100 % of Sum Insured for each illness.
100 % of Sum Insured for each illness.

options.description: All listed illnesses are available except Heart Transplant (Not Available).
options.payout_details: 100 % of Sum Insured for each available illness.

options.description: All listed illnesses are available except Angioplasty (Not Available) and Balloon Valvotomy/Valvuloplasty (Not Available).
options.payout_details: 100 % of Sum Insured for each available illness.

options.description: All listed illnesses are available except Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator and Pacemaker (Not Available).
options.payout_details: 100 % of Sum Insured for each available illness.

options.description: All listed illnesses are available except Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator and Pacemaker (Not Available).
options.payout_details: 100 % of Sum Insured for each available illness.

options.description: All listed illnesses are available except Angioplasty, Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator, Pacemaker, and Heart Transplant (Not Available).
options.payout_details: 100 % of Sum Insured for each available illness.

options.description: All listed illnesses are available except Angioplasty, Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator, Pacemaker, Heart Transplant (Not Available).
options.payout_details: 100 % of Sum Insured for each available illness.

coverages.name: Heart Diseases Cover – Definitions
coverages.description: Detailed definitions of each covered cardiac condition and associated exclusions.

coverages.name: Heart Diseases Cover – Initial Waiting Period
coverages.description: No payment for any hospitalization commencing within the waiting period specified in the schedule.

coverages.name: Heart Diseases Cover – Exclusions
coverages.description: Exclusions specific to Heart Diseases Cover.
section_specific_exclusions: Any illness other than those specified as covered under this section.

coverages.name: Heart Diseases Cover – Pre‑hospitalization
coverages.description: Covers pre‑hospitalization medical expenses for the covered cardiac illness.
conditions: Requires acceptance of an inpatient hospitalization claim for the same illness.
Date of admission is the first admission for the same illness.

coverages.name: Heart Diseases Cover – Post‑hospitalization
coverages.description: Covers post‑hospitalization medical expenses for the covered cardiac illness.
conditions: Requires acceptance of an inpatient hospitalization claim for the same illness.
Date of discharge is the discharge date for the same illness.

coverages.name: Heart Diseases Cover – Ambulance
coverages.description: Covers road ambulance transportation costs for emergencies related to the covered cardiac illness.
conditions: Ambulance provider must be registered.
Requires acceptance of an inpatient hospitalization claim for the same illness.
section_specific_exclusions: Transportation from hospital to residence is not covered.

coverages.name: Heart Diseases Cover – Follow‑up Care
coverages.description: Covers two medical examinations per policy year after treatment discontinuation with 'No evidence of disease' declaration.
conditions: Inpatient hospitalization claim must have been accepted.

coverages.name: Definitions
coverages.description: Key terms and definitions used throughout the policy (e.g., Insured Person, Policy Period, Covered Illness, First Incidence, etc.).

coverages.name: Claims Procedure
coverages.description: Procedure for filing claims, required documents, timelines, submission methods, and claim settlement process.

coverages.name: General Conditions
coverages.description: Standard policy terms including policy period, renewal, termination, assignment, amendment, and other overarching conditions.

coverages.name: Heart Diseases Cover
coverages.description: Provides a lump‑sum payout for specified cardiac illnesses and procedures.
conditions: Initial Waiting Period (Applicable for all 3 Options): No payment for covered illnesses whose signs or symptoms first occur within the waiting period specified in the policy schedule.
Survival Period (Applicable for all 3 Options): Benefit payable only if the insured survives the number of days specified in the policy schedule after diagnosis or surgical procedure.

waiting_periods.name: Pre-Existing Disease
waiting_periods.period: Number of months as specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table
waiting_periods.description:
Expenses related to the treatment of a pre-existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of number of months of continuous coverage after the Date of inception of the first policy with insurer, as specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table of this Policy.

b) In case of enhancement of sum insured the exclusion shall apply afresh to the extent of sum insured increase.

c) If the Insured Person is continuously covered without any break as defined under the portability norms of the extant IRDAI (Health Insurance) Regulations, then waiting period for the same wouId be reduced to the extent of prior coverage.

d) Coverage under the policy after the expiry of the number of months as specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table for any pre-existing disease is subject to the same being declared at the time of application and accepted by Us.
applicable_diseases: Any condition diagnosed within 48 months prior to the effective date of the policy or for which medical advice or treatment was received within 48 months prior to the effective date

waiting_periods.name: Specified disease / procedure waiting period
waiting_periods.description:
Expenses related to the treatment of the listed Conditions, surgeries/treatments shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy with Us. This exclusion shall not be applicable for claims arising due to an accident.

b) In case of enhancement of sum insured the exclusion shall apply afresh to the extent of sum insured increase.

c) If any of the specified disease/procedure falls under the waiting period specified for pre-existing diseases, then the longer of the two waiting periods shall apply.

d) The waiting period for listed conditions shall apply even if contracted after the policy or declared and accepted without a specific exclusion.

e) If the Insured Person is continuously covered without any break as defined under the applicable norms on portability stipulated by IRDAI, then waiting period for the same would be reduced to the extent of prior coverage.

f) List of specific diseases/procedures:
applicable_diseases: All Cysts & Polyps of the female genito urinary system
Stone in Gall Bladder and Bile duct
Fissure, Fistula in ano, hemorrhoids (piles), Pilonidal Sinus, Ano-rectal & Perianal Abscess
Gastric or Duodenal Erosions or Ulcers + Gastritis & Duodenitis
Stones in Urinary system (Kidney, Ureter, Urinary Bladder)
Benign Hypertrophy / Enlargement of Prostate (BHP / BEP)
Any swelling, tumour, cyst, nodule, ulcer, polyp anywhere in the body (unless malignant)
applicable_procedures: Surgery or Treatment for Otitis Media
Surgery for Prolapse of the intervertebral disc
Surgery for Hydrocele, Rectocele and Hernia
Removal of skin tumour unless malignant
Surgery for cyst, tumour, nodule, polyp unless malignant
Surgery for Varicose veins and Varicose ulcers

waiting_periods.name: First 30 Days Waiting Period
waiting_periods.description:
Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded except claims arising due to an accident, provided the same are covered.

i. This exclusion shall not, however, apply if the Insured Person has Continuous Coverage for more than twelve months.

ii. The within referred waiting period is made applicable to the enhanced sum insured in the event of granting higher sum insured subsequently.

waiting_periods.name: Initial Waiting Period (Section II.1 OPD Expenses)
waiting_periods.period: Number of days as specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table
waiting_periods.description: We shall not be liable to make any payment in respect of this Benefit as specified in this Section II.1 for any Hospitalization first commencing within the number of days as specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table of this Policy from the Start Date of initial Policy with Us.

waiting_periods.name: Initial Waiting Period (Section II.2 Cancer Secure Cover)
waiting_periods.period: Number of days as specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table
waiting_periods.description: We shall not be liable to make any payment in respect of any of the covered Illnesses of the nature specified in this Section II.2 whose consultation, investigation, diagnosis, treatment or admission commencing within the number of days as specified in the Policy Schedule/ Certificate of Insurance, from the Start Date of this Policy.

waiting_periods.name: Initial Waiting Period (Section II.3 Income Protect)
waiting_periods.period: Number of days as specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table
waiting_periods.description: We shall not be liable to make any payment in respect of this Benefit as specified in this Section II.3 for any Hospitalization first commencing within the number of days as specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table of this Policy from the Start Date of initial Policy with Us.

waiting_periods.name: Initial Waiting Period (Section II.5 Heart Secure Cover)
waiting_periods.period: Number of days as specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table
waiting_periods.description: We shall not be liable to make any payment in respect of any of the covered Illnesses of the nature specified in this Section II.5 whose signs or symptoms first occur within the number of days as specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table of this Policy from the Start Date of this Policy.

waiting_periods.name: Initial Waiting Period (Section II.6 Cancer Assure Cover)
waiting_periods.period: Number of days as specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table
waiting_periods.description: We shall not be liable to make any payment in respect of the covered Illness as specified under Section II.6 (a) of the nature specified in this Section II.6 whose signs or symptoms first occur within the number of days as specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table of this Policy from the Start Date of initial Policy with Us. The initial Waiting Period is not applicable for Renewal policies, if renewed continuously and without any break with Us.

waiting_periods.name: Initial Waiting Period (Section II.10 Heart Assure Cover)
waiting_periods.period: Number of days as specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table
waiting_periods.description: We shall not be liable to make any payment in respect of any of the covered Illnesses of the nature specified in this Section II.10 whose signs or symptoms first occur within the number of days as specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table of this Policy from the Start Date of this Policy.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 1
permanent_exclusions.description: Treatment directly or indirectly arising from or consequent upon war or any act of war, invasion, act of foreign enemy, war like operations (whether war be declared or not or caused during service in the armed forces of any country), civil war, public defense, rebellion, uprising, revolution, insurrection, military or usurped acts, nuclear weapons / materials, chemical and biological weapons, ionizing radiation, contamination by radioactive material or radiation of any kind, nuclear fuel, nuclear waste.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 2
permanent_exclusions.description: Expenses for treatment directly arising from or consequent upon any Insured Person committing or attempting to commit a breach of law with criminal intent.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 3
permanent_exclusions.description: Willful or deliberate exposure to danger, intentional self- Injury, non- adherence to Medical Advice, participation or involvement in naval, military or air force operation.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 4
permanent_exclusions.description: Expenses related to any treatment necessitated due to participation as a professional in hazardous or adventure sports, including but not limited to, para-jumping, rock climbing, mountaineering, rafting, motor racing, horse racing or scuba diving, hand gliding, sky diving, deep-sea diving.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 5
permanent_exclusions.description: Treatment for, Alcoholism, drug or substance abuse or any addictive condition and consequences thereof.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 6
permanent_exclusions.description: Any Illness/Injury/Accident due to abuse of intoxicants, smoking cessation programs and the treatment of nicotine addiction, unless prescribed by a Medical Practitioner.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 7
permanent_exclusions.description:
Obesity/ Weight Control. Expenses related to the surgical treatment of obesity that does not fulfil all the below conditions:
1) Surgery to be conducted is upon the advice of the Doctor
2) The surgery/Procedure conducted should be supported by clinical protocols
3) The member has to be 18 years of age or older and
4) Body Mass Index (BMI);
   a) greater than or equal to 40 or
   b) greater than or equal to 35 in conjunction with any of the following severe co-morbidities following failure of less invasive methods of weight loss:
   i. Obesity-related cardiomyopathy
   ii. Coronary heart disease
   iii. Severe Sleep Apnea
   iv. Uncontrolled Type2 Diabetes

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 8
permanent_exclusions.description: Refractive Error. Expenses related to the treatment for correction of eye sight due to refractive error less than 7.5 dioptres.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 9
permanent_exclusions.description: All routine examinations and preventive health check-ups.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 10
permanent_exclusions.description: Cosmetic or plastic Surgery. Expenses for cosmetic or plastic surgery or any treatment to change appearance unless for reconstruction following an Accident, Burn(s) or Cancer or as part of medically necessary treatment to remove a direct and immediate health risk to the insured. For this to be considered a medical necessity, it must be certified by the attending Medical Practitioner.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 11
permanent_exclusions.description: Circumcisions (unless necessitated by Illness or Injury and forming part of treatment).

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 12
permanent_exclusions.description: Change-of-Gender treatments. Expenses related to any treatment, including surgical management, to change characteristics of the body to those of the opposite sex.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 13
permanent_exclusions.description: Non- allopathic treatment unless mentioned as part of inclusions in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table of this Policy.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 14
permanent_exclusions.description: Conditions for which treatment could have been done on an out-patient basis without any Hospitalization (This exclusion is not applicable for Section II.1 'OPD Expenses').

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 15
permanent_exclusions.description: Experimental treatment, investigational treatments, devices and pharmacological regimens.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 16
permanent_exclusions.description: Unproven Treatments. Expenses related to any unproven treatment, services and supplies for or in connection with any treatment. Unproven treatments are treatments, procedures or supplies that lack significant medical documentation to support their effectiveness.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 17
permanent_exclusions.description:
Investigation & Evaluation. Expenses related to any admission primarily for diagnostics and evaluation purposes only are excluded.
3. Any diagnostic expenses which are not related or not incidental to the current diagnosis and treatment are excluded.
- b) Diagnostic expenses means and includes Diagnostic tests/procedures/treatment/consumables.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 18
permanent_exclusions.description:
Rest Cure, rehabilitation and respite care. Expenses related to any admission primarily for enforced bed rest and not for receiving treatment. This also includes:
 i. Custodial care either at home or in a nursing facility for personal care such as help with activities of daily living such as bathing, dressing, moving around either by skilled nurses or assistant or non-skilled persons.
 ii. Any services for people who are terminally ill to address physical, social, emotional and spiritual needs.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 19
permanent_exclusions.description: Convalescence, cure, sanatorium treatment, private duty nursing.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 20
permanent_exclusions.description: Preventive care, vaccination including inoculation and immunizations (except in case of post-bite treatment); any examinations or testing.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 21
permanent_exclusions.description: Admission for nutritional and electrolyte supplements unless certified to be required by the attending Medical Practitioner as a direct consequence of an otherwise covered claim.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 22
permanent_exclusions.description: Hearing aids, spectacles or contact lenses including optometric therapy, multifocal lens.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 23
permanent_exclusions.description: Treatment for alopecia, baldness, wigs, or toupees, and all treatment related to the same.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 24
permanent_exclusions.description: Medical supplies including elastic stockings, diabetic test strips, and products as specified in the Annexure B of this Policy - Non Medical Expenses , and on Our website www.adityabirlahealth.com/healthinsurance.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 25
permanent_exclusions.description: Any expenses incurred on prosthesis, corrective devices external durable medical equipment of any kind, like wheelchairs crutches, instruments used in treatment of sleep apnea syndrome or continuous ambulatory peritoneal dialysis (C.A.P .D.) and oxygen concentrator for bronchial asthmatic condition, cost of cochlear implant(s) unless necessitated by an Accident. Cost of artificial limbs, crutches or any other external appliance and/or device used for diagnosis or treatment.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 26
permanent_exclusions.description: Parkinson disease, general debility or exhaustion ('rundown condition'), sleep-apnea, stress.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 27
permanent_exclusions.description: External Congenital Anomalies, diseases or defects.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 28
permanent_exclusions.description: Stem cell therapy (except Hematopoietic stem cells for bone marrow transplant for haematological conditions) or surgery, or Growth hormone therapy or Hormone Replacement Therapy.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 29
Exclusion 30
permanent_exclusions.description:
Sterility and Infertility. Expenses related to sterility and infertility. This includes:
- i. Any type of contraception, sterilization
- ii. Assisted Reproduction services including artificial insemination and advanced reproductive technologies such as IVF, ZIFT, GIFT, ICSI
- iii. Gestational Surrogacy
- iv. Reversal of sterilization

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 31
permanent_exclusions.description: Expenses for organ donor screening, or save as and to the extent provided for in the treatment of the donor (including Surgery to remove organs from a donor in the case of transplant Surgery).

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 32
permanent_exclusions.description: Admission for Organ Transplant but not compliant under the Transplantation of Human Organs Act, 1994 (amended).

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 33
permanent_exclusions.description: Treatment and supplies for analysis and adjustments of spinal subluxation, diagnosis and treatment by manipulation of the skeletal structure; muscle stimulation by any means except treatment of fractures (excluding hairline fractures) and dislocations of the mandible and extremities.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 34
permanent_exclusions.description: Dentures and artificial teeth, Dental Treatment and Surgery of any kind, unless requiring Hospitalization due to an Accident.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 35
permanent_exclusions.description: Cost incurred for any health check-up or for the purpose of issuance of medical certificates and examinations required for employment or travel or any other such purpose.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 36
permanent_exclusions.description: Treatment for, Rotational Field Quantum Magnetic Resonance (RFQMR), External Counter Pulsation (ECP), Enhanced External Counter Pulsation (EECP), Hyperbaric Oxygen Therapy, KTP Laser Surgeries, cyber knife treatment, Femto laser surgeries, bioabsorbable stents, bioabsorbable valves, bioabsorbable implants, use of Infliximab, rituximab, avastin, lucentis & similar molecules.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 37
permanent_exclusions.description: Expenses which are medically not required such as items of personal comfort and convenience including but not limited to television (if specifically charged), charges for access to telephone and telephone calls (if specifically charged), food stuffs (save for patient's diet), cosmetics, hygiene articles, body care products and bath additives, barber expenses, beauty service, guest service as well as similar incidental services and supplies, vitamins and tonics unless certified to be required by the attending Medical Practitioner as a direct consequence of an otherwise covered claim. Non-Medical Expenses including but not limited to RMO, CMO, DMO charges, surcharges, night charges, service charges levied by the hospital under any head as specified in the Annexure B of this Policy, for Non- Medical Expenses and on Our website.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 38
permanent_exclusions.description: Treatment taken from a person not falling within the scope of definition of registered Medical Practitioner with any state medical council/ medical council of India.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 39
permanent_exclusions.description: Treatment charges or fees charged by any Medical Practitioner acting outside the scope of license or registration granted to him by any medical council.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 40
permanent_exclusions.description: Treatments rendered by a Medical Practitioner who is a member of the Insured Person's immediate family or stays with him in the same residence, except if pre-approved by Us.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 41
permanent_exclusions.description: Any treatment or part of a treatment that is not of a reasonable charge, is not a Medically Necessary Treatment. drugs or treatments which are not supported by a prescription.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 42
permanent_exclusions.description: Dietary supplements and substances that can be purchased without prescription, including but not limited to Vitamins, minerals and organic substances unless prescribed by a medical practitioner as part of hospitalization claim or day care procedure.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 43
permanent_exclusions.description: Charges related to a Hospital stay not expressly mentioned as being covered, including but not limited to charges for admission, discharge, administration, registration, documentation and filing, including MRD charges (medical records department charges).

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 44
permanent_exclusions.description: Treatment taken outside India.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 45
permanent_exclusions.description: In the event of the death of the Insured Person within the stipulated survival period as specified in the Policy Schedule / Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table of this Policy for the applicable Benefits.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 46
permanent_exclusions.description: Use of Radio Frequency (RF) probe for ablation or other procedure unless specifically approved by Us in writing in advance.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 47
permanent_exclusions.description: Excluded Providers. Expenses incurred towards treatment in any hospital or by any Medical Practitioner or any other provider specifically excluded by the Insurer as per Annexure C to this Policy and disclosed in website (www.adityabirlahealth.com/healthinsurance) / notified to the policyholders are not admissible. However, in case of life threatening situations or following an accident, expenses up to the stage of stabilization are payable but not the complete claim.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 48
permanent_exclusions.description: Treatments received in health hydros, nature cure clinics, spas or similar establishments or private beds registered as a nursing home attached to such establishments or where admission is arranged wholly or partly for domestic reasons.

permanent_exclusions.name: Exclusion 49
permanent_exclusions.description: In respect of the existing diseases, disclosed by the insured and mentioned in the policy schedule (based on insured's consent), policyholder is not entitled to get the coverage for specified ICD codes.

supporting_documents.document_display: Photo ID and Age proof of Insured Person / Nominee (if Insured Person is not alive)
Claim Form (in original) duly completed and signed as prescribed by Us
Original bills, receipts and copy of prescription, clinical notes from the Medical Practitioner / medical facility
Original bills from pharmacy supported by proper prescription (as applicable)
Investigation reports (Including CT scan/ MRI /USG / Histopathology or Biopsy report) and original bills, payment receipts
Any other document as required by Us or the TPA to investigate the claim or Our obligation to make any payment for it

coverages.name: Definitions
coverages.description: Key terms and definitions used throughout the policy (e.g., Insured Person, Policy Period, Covered Illness, First Incidence, etc.).

coverages.name: Claims Procedure
coverages.description: Procedure for filing claims, required documents, timelines, submission methods, and claim settlement process.

coverages.name: General Conditions
coverages.description: Standard policy terms including policy period, renewal, termination, assignment, amendment, and other overarching conditions.

coverages.name: Heart Diseases Cover
coverages.description: Provides a lump‑sum payout for specified cardiac illnesses and procedures.
conditions: Initial Waiting Period (Applicable for all 3 Options): No payment for covered illnesses whose signs or symptoms first occur within the waiting period specified in the policy schedule.
Survival Period (Applicable for all 3 Options): Benefit payable only if the insured survives the number of days specified in the policy schedule after diagnosis or surgical procedure.
